heading: Service of process
label: 230310 Service of process
text: The corporation shall have a designated agent in the District of Columbia to receive service of process for the corporation. Notice to or service on the agent, or mailed to the business address of the agent, is notice to or service on the corporation.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)23031036:769(b)., , .July 18, 1958Pub. L. 85–530, § 9(b)72 Stat. 373The words “at all times” are omitted as unnecessary. The words “to receive” are substituted for “authorized to accept”, and the word “is” is substituted for “will be deemed”, for consistency in the revised title.
